title: Plan community governance and decision-making processes
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan community governance and decision-making processes demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess current community governance and decision-making processes

pcs.text: Research and define characteristics and social structure of community
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and define characteristics and social structure of community?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and define characteristics and social structure of community.

pcs.text: Identify key stakeholders and community groups
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify key stakeholders and community groups?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify key stakeholders and community groups.

pcs.text: Investigate and define existing community governance and decision-making processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and define existing community governance and decision-making processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and define existing community governance and decision-making processes.

pcs.text: Collate information on proposed or existing governance issues and arrangements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collate information on proposed or existing governance issues and arrangements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate information on proposed or existing governance issues and arrangements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess current community governance and decision-making processes

elements.title: Develop options for community governance and decision-making processes

pcs.text: Identify opportunities and constraints for community governance and decision-making process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify opportunities and constraints for community governance and decision-making process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify opportunities and constraints for community governance and decision-making process.

pcs.text: Investigate options for community governance and decision-making processes consistent with community characteristics and social structure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate options for community governance and decision-making processes consistent with community characteristics and social structure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate options for community governance and decision-making processes consistent with community characteristics and social structure.

pcs.text: Consult with community on options for governance and decision-making processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with community on options for governance and decision-making processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with community on options for governance and decision-making processes.

pcs.text: Evaluate advantages and disadvantages for options in consultation with community
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate advantages and disadvantages for options in consultation with community?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate advantages and disadvantages for options in consultation with community.

pcs.text: Analyse reliability, sufficiency and validity of information for each option for community governance and decision-making process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse reliability, sufficiency and validity of information for each option for community governance and decision-making process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse reliability, sufficiency and validity of information for each option for community governance and decision-making process.

pcs.text: Select preferred option for implementation according to comparative advantages and analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select preferred option for implementation according to comparative advantages and analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select preferred option for implementation according to comparative advantages and analysis.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop options for community governance and decision-making processes

elements.title: Plan community governance and decision-making process

pcs.text: Determine legal framework under which community governance will take effect
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine legal framework under which community governance will take effect?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine legal framework under which community governance will take effect.

pcs.text: Ensure preferred option is consistent with legal framework
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure preferred option is consistent with legal framework?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure preferred option is consistent with legal framework.

pcs.text: Verify preferred option is consistent with community characteristics and social structure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify preferred option is consistent with community characteristics and social structure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify preferred option is consistent with community characteristics and social structure.

pcs.text: Identify potential risks to governance and decision-making process and develop strategies to mitigate risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential risks to governance and decision-making process and develop strategies to mitigate risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential risks to governance and decision-making process and develop strategies to mitigate risk.

pcs.text: Document governance plan and decision-making framework
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document governance plan and decision-making framework?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document governance plan and decision-making framework.

pcs.text: Identify and assign responsibilities to key community stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and assign responsibilities to key community stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assign responsibilities to key community stakeholders.

pcs.text: Communicate community governance and decision-making process to community for feedback and approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate community governance and decision-making process to community for feedback and approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate community governance and decision-making process to community for feedback and approval.

pcs.text: Review and rectify community governance and decision-making process according to feedback received
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and rectify community governance and decision-making process according to feedback received?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and rectify community governance and decision-making process according to feedback received.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor governance and decision-making activity for compliance with standards specified in process.

pcs.text: Record and report outcomes of process to community stakeholders for comment and feedback
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report outcomes of process to community stakeholders for comment and feedback?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report outcomes of process to community stakeholders for comment and feedback.

pcs.text: Review feedback and revise community governance and decision-making process

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review feedback and revise community governance and decision-making process.
